## API Reference

## Packages

|  Package | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  [@wixc3/browser](./browser.md) | Browser utilities |
|  [@wixc3/common](./common.md) | Useful utils for strings, iterables, objects, maps, promises and other commonly used structures |

|  [@wixc3/fs-utils](./fs-utils.md) | FS Path and package.json utils |
